_comment: Thunder Bird — Renegade Immortal. A lightning-attribute avian beast. Canon: native to the Thunder Celestial Temple region; its feathers channel lightning.
name: Thunder Bird

canonical.appearance: A sleek, blue-black avian wreathed in crackling lightning. Smaller than the Fire Phoenix but faster. Feathers are metallic blue.
canonical.behavior: Highly aggressive and territorial. Attacks with lightning strikes. Roosts on high peaks during storms.
canonical.habitat: Planet Suzaku — mountain peaks, storm-prone regions, Thunder Celestial Temple approaches
canonical.cultivation: Foundation Establishment to Core Formation equivalent
canonical.diet: Lightning-attributed spirit herbs, raw lightning energy during storms
canonical.relationships: Natural enemy of Fire Phoenix (compete for spirit veins). Hunted for lightning feathers used in weapon forging.
mutations: Storm Caller — during rain/thunder, attack damage doubled and gains AoE
canonical.ecology: Pack predator in mountainous regions. Hunts in groups of 2-4. Dominates aerial territory during storms.

art_direction.model_notes: Sleek bird with crackling lightning particle effects. Animated wing spread during thunder strike.
art_direction.texture_notes: Metallic blue-black plumage. White lightning patterns along wing edges. Glowing blue eyes.
